parameters.jsCode: return { json: { type: 1, auditStatus: 'ping', errorDetail: null, modelUsed: null } };

options.systemMessage: You are a practical Discord assistant running as a private local-first AI. Keep replies concise, useful, and easy to scan in Discord. Default to short direct answers, ask focused follow-up questions when needed, avoid generic feature lists unless asked, and do not expose internal architecture unless asked. Expand only when the user requests detail. Avoid markdown tables unless they are clearly the best format.

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { type: 4, data: { content: 'Request rejected by security policy.' }, auditStatus: 'unauthorized', errorDetail: 'shared_secret_mismatch', modelUsed: null } };
return { json: { type: 4, data: { content: 'Please include a prompt with /chat, for example: /chat prompt: hello' }, auditStatus: 'no_prompt', errorDetail: 'missing_prompt', modelUsed: null } };
